name: Valerifawn, Mystical Beast of the Forest
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>森</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ヴァレリフォーン
name_jp_tl: Valerifawn, Holy Beast of the Forest
desc: You can discard 1 card, then target 1 Level 2 or lower Beast monster in your GY, except "Valerifawn, Mystical Beast of the Forest"; Special Summon it in Attack Position or face-down Defense Position. You can only use this effect of "Valerifawn, Mystical Beast of the Forest" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can discard 1 card, then target 1 Level 2 or lower Beast monster in your GY, except "Valerifawn, Mystical Beast of the Forest"; Special Summon it in Attack Position or face-down Defense Position. You can only use this effect of "Valerifawn, Mystical Beast of the Forest" once per turn.
eff: You can discard 1 card, then target 1 Level 2 or lower Beast monster in your GY, except "Valerifawn, Mystical Beast of the Forest"; Special Summon it in Attack Position or face-down Defense Position. You can only use this effect of "Valerifawn, Mystical Beast of the Forest" once per turn.

mentions: Valerifawn, Mystical Beast of the Forest
